>Erm.  I don't think that this level of detail for "environment" was
>anything we'd ever envisioned when we included this field. :-)  Just
>a simple uname -a string will do.

Oops.  Sorry about that.

BTW - you had mailed me a while ago about becoming a port committer.  I am
not purposely ignoring you, I've just been real busy lately, what with
school coming to a close, etc.  Hopefully during Thanksgiving break I'll
have some time to go through some of my e-mail backlog.
